briefdescription.para: returns an iterator to the smallest epsilon, or end() if there is no epsilon
Get the set of all target states in the StatePost.

simplesect.para: Set of all target states in the StatePost.

briefdescription.para: Returns a reference to target states for a given symbol in the StatePost.

detaileddescription.para: If there is no such symbol, a static empty set is returned.

parameterdescription.para: Symbol to get the successors for.

simplesect.para: Set of target states for the given symbol.

briefdescription.para: Iterator over all moves (over all labels) in StatePost represented as Move instances.
Iterator over specified moves in StatePost represented as Move instances.

parameterdescription.para: First iterator over symbol posts to iterate over.
End iterator over symbol posts (which functions as an sentinel, is not iterated over).

briefdescription.para: Iterator over epsilon moves in StatePost represented as Move instances.
Iterator over alphabet (normal) symbols (not over epsilons) in StatePost represented as Move instances.
Count the number of all moves in StatePost.

detaileddescription.para: This function expects the vector to be sorted.

briefdescription.para: Compute set difference as this minus rhs.

parameterdescription.para: Other vector with symbols to be excluded.

briefdescription.para: Check whether key exists in the ordered vector.
Get reference to the last element in the vector.

detaileddescription.para: Modifying the underlying value in the reference could break sortedness.
Static method for conversion of an object of any class with the << output operator into a string

simplesect.para: The string representation of the object.

briefdescription.para: A data structure representing possible transitions over different symbols from a source state.

detaileddescription.para: It is an ordered vector containing possible SymbolPost (i.e., pair of symbol and target states). SymbolPosts in the vector are ordered by symbols in SymbolPosts.
